violations.text: Glass door on chest freezer was observed cracked. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezers have an accumulation of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The ceiling in the walk-in freezer used for storage is in poor repair (peeling observed in various spots). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Slicer was observed with food debris, nicks and rust on blade and sharpener. Slicer was taken out of service during time of inspection. Slicer must be repaired/refurbished/ replaced prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The door to the outside, located by the dumpster, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the storage room shelving have an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024
The 2 bay prep sink is lacking a proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

The following was observed in poor repair: 1. Coving by the prep sink (COB: 08/05/2024) 2. Walls by door frame in the back storage room (COB: 08/05/2024) 3. Wall fixture by dishmachine (COB: 08/05/2024) 4. Floor tiles by the dishwashing machine (COB: 07/22/2025) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
Bottom rack of the preparation table located in the kitchen area was observed rusty. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
The 2-door reach-in Refrigerator door gaskets located at the kitchen were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
